posts.title: The Council: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon's ban
posts.excerpt: After Anthropic's weeks-long standoff with the Pentagon, the company won one milestone: A judge granted Anthropic a preliminary injunction in its laws

posts.title: The Council: OpenAI is throwing everything into building a fully automated researcher
posts.excerpt: OpenAI is refocusing its research efforts and throwing its resources into a new grand challenge. The San Francisco firm has set its sights on building
